title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux & Windows with one command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, push models with simple API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration allowing Ollama models to be used as LLM, chat or embedding endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); supports multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; provides synchronous & asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: chatbox-ai
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client (Windows/Mac/Linux) supporting Ollama, OpenAI, Azure, Claude; has folders, prompts, markdown.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for building LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate local Ollama models into no-code workflows (chat, generate, embeddings).

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama REST API; async/tokio support for chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama server + GPU support (nvidia/cuda).

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection, autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper for Ollama with conversation history, prompt templates, markdown rendering and shell integration.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams responses from local Ollama models into any Discord channel using slash commands.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama REST API with GenServer behaviour, streaming and telemetry events.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; simple DSL for chat, generate, pull, list, delete with Faraday under the hood.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local Ollama models into Slack threads with streaming and model switching.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: YouTube walkthrough repo: build a RAG chatbot with Ollama embeddings, LangChain, Chroma and Streamlit in 30 min.
